statement.en: Lean 4 progress: G 3 Subgraph — 14 theorems/lemmas, 0 sorry, 0 axiom
statement.ja: Lean 4 進捗: G 3 Subgraph — 定理 14 / sorry 0 / axiom 0
statement.headerDoc:
STEP 1127 (2026-05-14): G_3 subgraph structure theorems for Paper 152 v0.3 §5d.

  Companion to:
    - ThreeAdicIsolation.lean (Theorem 5b: no odd predecessor of 3 | v)
    - PeakMergeInvariant.lean (Büchi-25 native_decide)
    - PeakMergeWitness.lean (1,000-witness existential closure)

  This file mechanizes Paper 152 v0.3 §5d Lemma 5d.1 (G_3 edges are
  inverse-halving only) and Lemma 5d.2 (G_3 chain decomposition) as far
  as classical Mathlib + ThreeAdicIsolation allows.

  Key theorem (Lemma 5d.1):
    ∀ v with 3 | v, ∀ c : ℕ, collatzStep c = v → c = 2v.

  In words: within the multiples

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
